reviews.name: Etsy Customer
reviews.text: Great product, I just ordered the wrong one.  He does have a separate listing for Elgato Key Light Air, my mistake.  He was very responsive and corrected the situation immediately.

reviews.text: Item arrived on time. Its exactly what it says it’s for. I bought it by mistake I have the older model but I can still use it.  Thank You.

reviews.product: Arctis Pro Wireless NOVA and ELITE Secretl...
reviews.text: Great quality and craftsmanship! I love how it fits perfectly around the Arctis Nova pro wireless hub. It also has very strong magnets that work with my secret labs magnus desk. I love how it helps things within reach and keeps my desk clear. Genius!

reviews.text: Its simple and works as intended. The only thing I would recommend is to add a horizontal platform to raise the smartphone a little as the smartphone has to be used upside down for vertical videos.
